8.title: Jailing under 35
8.content: If a player commits a kickable or bannable offense while the server population is under 35, you must jail them until the server population reaches 35 or higher.  You must inform the player that if they remain jailed for more than 5 minutes, they are allowed to leave.  • If the player leaves before 5 minutes, it is considered LTAP. • If the player leaves after 5 minutes, simply log the punishment and take no further action. • If the player stays until the server reaches 35 or higher, proceed with normal moderation (kick or ban as appropriate).

9.content: How abt making the New York bot automatically send a ping to actively moderating that we are under 35 and that they shouldn’t kick. If staff are on discord like they’re supposed to be then they can see this and they won’t kick. This will reduce infractions by a lot

18.title: Mass RDM
18.content: Mass RDM should be a kick and not a ban. I say this because, if we check on the Staff Guide, it says "3 Warnable offenses = Kick" and RDM is a warnable offense, after that it says that Mass RDM is considered as 3 RDMs or more, and 3 RDMs should be a kick, 3 warnable offenses. And anyways we are farming bans with mass RDMs. I see to much because that.

21.title: Staff Patrol Zones
21.content: If multiple staff members are online, patrol zones should be used. For example, if six staff are on duty, they can be split into groups of two or three and assigned to different areas, such as three in Springfield and three in the City, to ensure proper coverage.

78.title: Supervisor Training Program!
78.content: The Supervisor Training Program is designed to equip new supervisors with the essential skills and knowledge required for effective supervision. It addresses the common challenges faced by newly promoted supervisors, such as understanding their responsibilities and managing tasks efficiently. The program covers various aspects of supervision, including ticket handling, training for moderators and administrators, and user infraction management. Additionally, it provides comprehensive information on  and becoming a professional Supervisor.

79.title: Let Staff Transfers have their own role

80.title: Make a whitelisted server
80.content: NYCRPP is nearly about to be a 17 k server. But that is besides the point. ERLC is getting boring and moderating the server is the only thing I do because I know I won't enjoy roleplaying here. RPs are terrible, a lot of people lack the braincells. Making a whitelisted server resolves that issue. People would be forced to use their mics, apply via application, and it also gives departments a better chance to RP as well. You guys have the staff, management, director & foundation team to do it. You guys also have the money, theres a queue for paid ads to be sent out, clearly shows money isn't the issue. What is the issue then? Yes, its time consuming, but understand we should be be offering quality RP, quality over quantity trust me. There isn't any whitelisted NYC servers, why not be the first and be sucessful? I'm willing to help but y'all just need to listen to what your staff members want.

93.title: Reinstatement/ Retirement
93.content: Staff members should complete a minimum period of service before becoming eligible for retirement. Additionally, a mandatory waiting period  should be required before a retired staff member reinstates. This will prevent individuals from retiring immediately after training or reinstating within days of their retirement.

94.title: Supervisor Training Program!
94.content:
Greeting, Superior. My name is Watershark, and I have a suggestion about our supervisors. As you all know, many of our supervisors are handpicked or promoted from the rank of Senior Administration. However, when they get promoted, they often lack the necessary skills and knowledge to effectively manage their teams. Therefore, we, as a team, should take the initiative to train them.

Now, you might be wondering how this training program would work and what it would cover. Well, the program will cover the fundamental aspects of being a supervisor, including ticket management, training for trial moderators and administrators, and infraction management. Not only will this training be incredibly beneficial and useful for our upcoming supervisors, but it will also demonstrate their professionalism and commitment to the team’s success.

120.title: Grappler on 50/50
120.content: The grappler should be allowed on 50/50 because it helps players move quickly during intense situations like pursuits or emergencies. It adds more strategy and realism by giving players another tool to reach difficult places. Allowing it would also make gameplay more dynamic and give players more options during situations.

121.title: NYC Alts.
121.content: Make all the alts of NYC have blue skin or make a channel with their name so we know who the alts are.

122.title: Quota
122.content: I believe HRS/ SHRs should have a message quota to show activity.

123.title: Migrate all staff docs to melonly docs
123.content: Move things like staff/IA guides to melonly docs, this allows you to more easily prevent the guides being leaked as you can restrict access to a document in melonly to melonly/discord roles the users already have

124.title: SPAG Command
124.content: What my suggestion is, is we should make a command, that when a HR runs, /spag-check , or anything like that, they can check a staff members SPaG score in percentage, their amount of messages they've sent in the server in a wave or just always, and their SPaG overall etc. This will be handy to view if people are being professional before being promoted, although you don't need spag in staff chat etc, it's still very handy, maybe you can set SPaG from staff chat to false, and it's just overall handy!

125.title: Update ?iahandled command
125.content: Add new ticket types to command, e.g infraction appeals

126.title: Answer key for trainings
126.content: There should be a answer key for TA trainings and TM traings thar supervisor and above can look at. Staff who went on LOA and come back should be able to review through it or use that to grade people on trainings.

127.title: IA Infraction command
127.content: PLEASE add a command like /infract but maybe /ia-infract or something so we don't have to manually log/role them

128.title: Fix the retirement system
128.content: Instead of using the users discord nickname to get the roblox id, just use the melonly/bloxlink api's to directly get the roblox user id. Using the exact nickname is an extremely bad and unreliable way of doing it

130.title: New Custom CMDS
130.content: I was a staff in a random server. They had some custom cmds like !hi which introduced themselves, !{role-name} to ping that role etc. We should have this so we could handle tickets more faster

131.title: Team BL
131.content: Make where you can select users to blacklist from a team permanently or for a duration. Kind of like the group lock but easier for moderators. This would allow us to punish the users with a real punishment.

132.title: infraction timestamps
132.content: In the infractions command, add a field to add how many days/hours an infraction is, and in the embed it adds a timestamp for when that infraction is appealable

133.title: Stop 2x promos
133.content: People are ranking up super fast who haven’t gone through proper training or aren’t ready for the rank

134.title: End 24/7 sessions
134.content: I think it's time to end 24/7 sessions, sure having "100+ day sessions" are nice. But when it's getting to the point where your bribing and begging people to join with 2x promos just so you get above 25 players in the server, while you have really low quality roleplays, rule breakers everywhere because most of the staff are sleeping.. It's better to have sessions maybe 16 hours a day, with high quality roleplays, multiple staff on duty at all times than struggling to maintain 24 hour sessions that have no quality

135.title: Update ?iahandled command
135.content: Add new ticket types, e.g infraction appeals to ?iahandled and add a command similar to $myquota for ia ticket quotas. You could also possibly add something to the log embed of how many tickets the user has done during that wave

136.title: In-game events
136.content: We need to stop doing pop up events in-game, everytime somebody does a in-game event like ARMY deployed city under lockdown things like that, it causes chaos and the server dies out, we were at 40 today and amit hosted a army deployement the server was super chaotic and the server died out in under 5 minutes we reached 22 players, we can't be hosting events like that it kills the server.

137.title: Staff IA
137.content: So I think if you get accepted for IA You should get the rank in game too? Who agress?

138.title: LET PEOPLE PARTNERSHIP
138.content: I WANT PEOPLE TO PARTNERSHIP IF WE HAVE A BETTER SEVER MORE PARTNERSHIPS

140.content: I would like you all to add Community Team , Community Manager will be the Overseers, the job of the team is to look after events , Community Suggestions, Peoples thoughts on how we can improve , etc

141.title: Infraction view cmd
141.content: While ppl appeal their infraction, instead of digging through the Infraction channel, they may run infraction view to just tell the Infraction ID

142.title: IA mute perms
142.content: Give IA or IAS mute perms for situations like someone spamming NSFW or racist content in public channels, this would allow us to mitigate the situation before someone with ban perms is able to deal with the situation.

143.title: liveries
143.content: re-add administrator and HR livery to corvette or to a different car

144.title: SZ detection
144.content: Melony detects random places as safezones, I have wittnessed someone on ice and they were PMed saying they SZ RDMed at SO.

145.title: Remove game moderation from IA
145.content: Remove the game moderation from staff who are only part of internal affairs as well.. they aren’t game moderation

146.content: Make it instead of 4.5 hours make it when you finish your quota you are able to hop on 50/50

147.title: Add staff liveries to the guide
147.content: Add a list of what staff liveries are on what cars to the staff guide, this saves us having to go through a massive list of cars to find for example IA liveries as some of them are very bad quality, some are decent

148.title: Stop the spam pings
148.content: Stop pinging game moderation or doing staff requests when there's already 5-10 staff in game with a full server, sure a few people join but most people just supress role mentions for the server to avoid the pointless pings

149.title: Map Unrealistic Improvement
149.content: For the love of god, please remove the construction which blocks the entire road near PD, like why would there be so long pillars and so many random stuff in the road of the NYPD Station, also why are they there?? there is also no logic between them its just **VERY** unrealistic and has no point just please remove it, it just ruins RP and makes us turn around.

150.title: Use `:log` Command for Automations
150.content: Scrape the `:log` command for the staff to send custom messages in-game. Like for example when the taxi is up, when the store is open, etc. this would help the staff alot. Instead of typing out the ENTIRE message, `:h {string}`, they would just type `:log coffee` and the bot would scrape it and send the automated message. This would allow for non-admins to do it too. This would remove the need of using the `:h` and `:m` commands entirely. This would make the server more secure.

151.content: Instead of making 50/50 quota the same for all ranks you can lower it as the staff members gets promoted, Ex: for a JM 50/50 quota is 4 hours, for a JA 50/50 quota could be 3 hours.

152.title: Owners and DT closing tickets
152.content: Once you’re done just tell us to log it and close you don’t need to send a close request immediately. Since otherwise we have to send ticket transcripts or ticket logs. Just let us finish logging it, it takes like 2 seconds. If we don’t respond in 5 minutes with a ?handled message then close it. Like please 🙏

153.title: Chief Executive
153.content: Bring back Chief Executive and remove Community Management. Why because whoever gets that Community Management role never does events. Or we could bring back that Event team...

154.title: Remove some automod words.
154.content: Remove “sus” and “fart” from automod I mean come on, there’s much worse words you can sub those 2 out with.

Please add verbal warning or notice feature in bot? Like we get strike or Warning option can we have verbal warning/ notice option?


Due to this we will be able to send VW in infraction it will be easier for us to search that the user already got vw before or not

159.title: DC checks refrom
159.content: Reform needed for DC checks: We need a bot to automatically detect people not in the discord server and sends out a message warning them, with a time limit. If they do not join within that period of time, have a message sent out to the on-duty staff to teleport to them and have them join the discord server. This could majorly improve the effenciency of DC checks, and keep the on-duty staff occupied.

160.title: HR Reforms
160.content: Its time to demote all inactive people and give active people a chance.

161.content: I know you guys concern is not enough active moderation, but making the 50/50 quota 1h than our quota wouldnt make it any better.

162.title: Allow animal rp.
162.content: Im not sure why yall are so against it. As long as the animals dont break any rules, its not against TOS or anything. Plus it'll be fun. Perms can be give by HR and above.

163.title: Please re-activate in-game "log punish commands"
163.content: It has setting in melonly website, we can re-activate it there. If someone cant find it, just ping me i'll show.

164.title: Remove hospital as a SZ.
164.content: The hospital is so much bigger after the expansion. We could have hostage rps there or just normal rps there.

165.title: RP logs bot
165.content:
The RP logs bot really has no use because there’s no point in typing all of that such as postal, Y/N, etc. There’s literally no point and make it shorter like. 
- User
- RP
- Time
- Place (if any)
No one is gonna use the bot if you’re asking for postals and all of that. Once the RP bot is made like this, then we can even restrict manual rp logging and have an “/rplogsview command for all users if possible. The reason why no one uses the bot is because of all the unecessary details.

How people will know that it's against SERVER '  RULES?

167.title: Economy bot
167.content: Give us an economy bot like unbelivabout, it would add some engagement to the server

168.title: Important Suggestion Related to VW.
168.content: As per handbook staff first gets VERBAL WARNING if they repeat the same mistake then they get warning and so on based on their violation. Now the problem is how staff will know that the guy already violated the rule if it's not in Infraction channel? Please allow us to send Verbal Warning in infraction channel or make another channel for it. Because imagine a guy violating offence 4 times but we don't know he got VW before or not and we give them VW again instead of warning.

169.title: We should use Melony CAD
169.content: (Sorry if this is not staff related in advance) We should use the new melony CAD, It would make the server way more realisitic.

170.title: Raffle
170.content: So, as you all should  know, there is a raffle of 500robux plus nitro every week for members who reach 25+hours on their quota. so, my suggestion is that there should be a 1st place (spin wheel with all people that got 25+hrs) and then a 2nd place (in which shay or whoever spins the wheel with whoever got 15-25hours) , also with 3rd place (for people who got 10-14 hours) REWARDS - 1st place would be Nitro + 500robux how it always has been. 2nd - 200 robux , 3rd - 100 robux

172.title: Make SZRDM kick or temp ban
172.content: I do understand that people need to have complete peace of mind in some areas but people shouldn’t get banned from ever playing in the server again because of shooting someone; if RDM is a warning and SRDM is a kick shouldn’t SZRDM be a kick or temp ban?
